meaning: adj.肉体的,肉欲的,耽于声色的,肉感的
examples: Thus fleshly descent meant nothing in this instance.
Many times they were enticed by the fleshly forms of pagan temple worship.
Well, is this the same body as the — as the long bone —? A fleshly bone that was here last week?
Wadsworth looked long at the portrait, which, over the last days, had come to assume for him equal reality with its fleshly subject, and then he made several decisions.
